missing_requirements.evidence_quote: The people with the startups ideas at different levels of implementation have to approach different firms or individuals for investment who are in their nearest business circles, if not in the same state.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall allow entrepreneurs to privately approach firms or angel investors with their ideas implemented at different levels for funding and mentorship.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: All of these will adversely impact the opportunities for the startups.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall minimize the adverse impacts on startup opportunities.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow investors to call for a presentation of an idea if they like it.
hallucinations.reason: This requirement is not mentioned in the source text. It seems to be a hallucination.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall enable mentors to provide mentorship.
hallucinations.reason: While the source text mentions 'mentors also can give mentorship', it does not explicitly state that they will provide mentorship through the system.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall allow entrepreneurs to privately approach firms or angel investors with their ideas implemented at different levels for funding and mentorship.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall enable entrepreneurs to request investors or mentors from different states for submitting their ideas.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and can be combined into a single requirement.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to view and apply for government loans and policies through the portal.
ambiguities.reason: This requirement is ambiguous because it does not specify how the users will interact with the portal. Will they be able to submit applications, or just view information?

Source text:
<<<
The policies and guidelines for startups vary from state to state. Also, startups related to a particular domain are emphasized in particular areas. The people with the startups ideas at different
levels of implementation have to approach different firms or individuals for investment who are in
their nearest business circles, if not in the same state. All of these will adversely impact the opportunities for the startups. Startup meet is a platform for people to privately approach firms or angel
investors with their ideas implemented at different levels for funding and mentorship. Also, the
government policies and loan schemes of different states can be known and applied. If people are
interested in the idea a virtual presentation can be given about it to them. There will be profiles for
investors and entrepreneurs (people with startup ideas) where they will be describing about what
they are looking for. The entrepreneur has to request investors or mentors from different states for
submitting his ideas. Once accepted he can send an abstract about it. If the investors like it, they
can call for a presentation of it. The mentors also can give mentorship. The government loans and
policies can be viewed and also be applied through the portal. So, startup meet is a comprehensive
platform for people who are into startups (Figures 39.1–39.8)
>>>
